name: @forgeax/bevy-3d-shapes
description: Reproduction of Bevy's `3d_shapes` example (a gallery row of procedural primitives) — exercises all 7 @forgeax/engine-geometry factories incl. the new createCapsuleGeometry, standard-PBR + PointLight via direct world.spawn.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle downstream of engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: gallery demo; fps no-regression covered by hello-cube / hello-room gates

bench.reason: gallery demo; bench focus on engine-math / pixel-parity

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; Bevy 3d_shapes reproduction
